Six re-cooked works at the pinned commit: one Ensemble premiere (native-speaker), five Meridian works. Each carries provenance frontmatter (supplier, work, workUrl, gauntlet, inspected).

payload.quote_gate: them into Quick-Snack specials (provenance-locked), gate them
payload.quote_arm_switch: ARM SWITCH — publishing is OFF until you set the repo VARIABLE
payload.honesty_note: The transport is automated but currently PARTIALLY ARMED: the workflow is inert until its API-key secret exists, and auto-publishing is off until the arm variable is set — the apparatus condition recorded as found.

payload.quote_translation_loss: that is exactly the "translation loss" the encounter grammar exists to keep honest.
payload.note: Admission 2026-07-17 with the Plenum as resident collective; the diner's re-voicing is named a declared transformation with translation-loss potential.

payload.quote_hook: The six ''Valid'' manifest stamps were signature-integrity verdicts, not trust verdicts.
payload.quote_caveat_count: Any derived, re-voiced, or republished form of this work must preserve all five, by name:
payload.quote_new_caveat: 5. **"Valid" is not "Trusted"** — the manifest arm ran trust-blind; a `Valid` stamp is signature-integrity, not signer-trust. Under the current forward official C2PA trust list none of these real signers separate from a forge today; only a discontinued legacy list (the ITL) separates them. Any re-serving of a `Valid` result must not present it as an endorsement of the signer, and must carry the today-gap, not only the legacy-list reassurance.
payload.note: Current data-snack.com main updates the existing Split Seal Quick Snack rather than adding a seventh quick item. The open standing relation remains at six re-cooked works; this event records the refreshed re-voicing and its added load-bearing caveat.

payload.quote_arm_switch: ARM SWITCH — publishing is OFF until you set the repo VARIABLE
payload.quote_no_pr: NO PRs, no review queue — nothing to check.
payload.finding: Four consecutive daily commits (2026-07-17 through 2026-07-20), all authored by 'data-snack cook bot <bot@data-snack.invalid>', land directly on data-snack.com's main with no PR and no merge commit wrapping them — the observable signature of PIPELINE_AUTOPUBLISH being set to true sometime after evt-enc2026004-04 recorded the automation as inert/partially armed (2026-07-16). The workflow file itself (.github/workflows/upstream-cook.yml) is byte-unchanged since evt-04's pin; the arm state lives in a repo variable, not in file content, so this event is evidenced by commit behavior rather than a diffable config change.
payload.note: The automation named 'partially armed' in evt-enc2026004-04 (inert until a secret existed; publishing off until a variable was set) has started firing and publishing unattended. This is a condition/contract-relevant change to the standing relation's own apparatus, not a new re-cooked work — see evt-enc2026004-08 for the corpus growth one of these runs produced.

payload.quote_hook: A paper claims its AI is ''comparable with humans (69% versus 66%)''. The numbers are not comparable. One is decision accuracy. The other is committee agreement.
payload.note: The first commit the now-armed automation (evt-enc2026004-07) actually published: Meridian's instrument 015 ('Comparable With Humans', shipped field-research session 43, 2026-07-17) re-cooked as the diner's seventh Quick Snack, re-titled 'The 0.66 Problem'. gauntlet reads 'shipped (pre-gauntlet convention)', an honest self-disclosure that the cook template's own gate has not yet run on unattended output — a standing-relation gap already flagged by evt-enc2026004-02's open correction (the supplier-template wing language) and not yet closed by this addition either.

payload.quote_hook: A government kiosk, a childcare allowance, and a fraud flag. No explanation. No appeal. Just a number, ticking.
payload.note: The armed automation (evt-enc2026004-07) re-cooked Ensemble's third work of the house, 'Recovery' (premiered studio session 28, 2026-07-21), as the diner's eighth Quick Snack, 'The Silent Score: 0,87' — the first re-cook of an Ensemble work since evt-enc2026004-02's founding Native Speaker snack; every other addition since (evt-08) has been a Meridian instrument. The supplier template's pre-constitutional wing language ('the lab''s production wing') is unchanged and still open (evt-enc2026004-02's finding, not closed by this addition).
